item.title: Rand Kiessig
item.description:
Rand Kiessig

Email: rkiessig@iq.harvard.edu

Biography

Rand Kiessig

Manager, IQSS Computer Lab Services

email rkiessig@iq.harvard.edu

Rand Kiessig joined IQSS in May 2012 and has led IQSS Computer Lab Services since 2015. A California native, Rand has lived across the U.S. — from Washington State to North Carolina to Massachusetts — with stints in Mexico and Spain along the way. Before coming to Harvard, he held a range of technical roles at organizations including Microsoft, Verio, Data General, and Iron Mountain.Recommended Apps:1Password: Having a password manager is extremely important, and 1Password will help you do that while also alerting you to password that may be compromised. Harvard now has a relationship with 1Password that you can check out here. Highly recommended.Coconut Battery: A quick way to look at battery health of your Mac, iPhone and iPad. (macOS, iOS).App Cleaner: Allows complete uninstalls of unwanted apps. (macOS).Prey Project: A security app that can help in the recovery of your stolen phone, tablet, or laptop. Highly recommended.

item.title: Maria Martins
item.description:
Maria Martins

Maria Martins

email

mmartins@iq. harvard. edu

Maria Joined IQSS in March of 2016. Prior to IQSS, she worked as a Executive Assistant in the Office for Sponsored Programs (OSP) for eight years. Before Harvard, Maria worked for The Inn at Harvard as the Office Manager and at the Hilton Back Bay and Hilton Logan Airport as a Sales and Catering Assistant.

View the original profile at iq.harvard.edu

Emily Lawrence

item.title: Dwayne Liburd
item.description:
Dwayne Liburd

Email: dliburd@hmdc.harvard.edu

Biography

Dwayne Liburd

Library Assistant, Data Acquisition and Archiving, Data Science

email dliburd@hmdc.harvard.edu

Dwayne Liburd is the Data Technology Support Associate in Data Acquisition and Archiving. His responsibilities include assisting the Manager of Data Acquisition, providing assistance on using Dataverse services, and providing user support for Dataverse. Dwayne also maintains the Henry A. Murray Research Archive Dataverse. He performs the cataloging of the metadata, storage of data related to the archive, and data processing, preservation, and dissemination of the original holdings of the Archive.	 

People By Last Name K - L

item.title: Devika Jain
item.description:
Devika Jain

Email: kakkar@fas.harvard.edu

Biography

Devika Jain

GIS Data Science Manager

email kakkar@fas.harvard.edu

At CGA, Devika Jain leads initiatives in GeoAI, Spatial Data Science and Big Data using High-Performance Computing (HPC) and Cloud Computing. She has led the development of impactful solutions, including TSGI (a UN-recognized spatial well-being metric), RINX- a transformative tool for the handling of raster big data , and a novel K-NN method enabling the first individual-level analysis of partisan segregation in USA. She has also led the development of university-wide Spatial Data Infrastructure (SDI) at Harvard.Jain has managed key projects funded by Harvard’s Office of the Vice Provost for Research (OVPR), the National Science Foundation’s Industry–University Cooperative Research Centers (NSF/IUCRC), and the Gates Foundation. Her research was one of the nationally selected projects for the National Science Foundation’s I-GUIDE Spatial AI Challenge Cohort. Jain is the recipient of several prestigious awards, including the American Association of Geographers (AAG’s) Health Data Visualization Award, Geospatial Rising Star Award, and the Women in GIS Distinguished Contributions Award given in collaboration with ESRI. Her work has been featured in prominent media outlets, including The New York Times, MIT, NSF/IUCRC, MOC Alliance and Harvard News.Prior to her role at the Center for Geographic Analysis, she worked with Fraunhofer IIS, the German Research Foundation, and the London School of Economics (LSE). She holds a Master of Science in Geoinformation Science from the Technical University of Berlin, Germany and Bachelor of Technology in Civil Engineering from HBTU, India.

item.title: Cameron Harvey
item.description:
Cameron Harvey

Email: help@iq.harvard.edu

Biography

Cameron Harvey

IT Client Support Services Associate

email help@iq.harvard.edu

Cameron Harvey joined IQSS in 2018 as an IT Client Services Support Specialist. He provides members of the IQSS community with IT desktop support. Previosly Cameron worked in the role of IT Systems Administrator for an EMS service provider, as well as IT Systems Support for a medical firm.	 

People By Last Name H - J

Role Staff Technical Support

item.title: Bailey Moore
item.description:
Bailey Moore

Email: baileymoore@iq.harvard.edu

Biography

Bailey Moore

IT Client Support Services Associate

email baileymoore@iq.harvard.edu

Bailey Moore joined IQSS in 2024 as an IT Client Services Support Specialist. She went to school for Computer Networking at Lamar Institute of Technology. She grew up in Texas, moved to New York, and now is in Boston. Previously Bailey worked as a Network Administrator for a School District, and IT Help Desk for Neches FCU before that. 

People By Last Name M - P

item.title: Gustavo Durand
item.description:
Gustavo Durand

Gustavo Durand

email

Gustavo Durand is the Technical Lead and Architect of Dataverse, an open source data repository platform developed by IQSS at Harvard University.

item.title: Keri Lemasters
item.description:
Keri Lemasters

Keri Lemasters

email

klemasters@iq. harvard. edu

Keri joined the sponsored finance team at IQSS in February of 2019 and has worked in sponsored administration for nine years. Keri supports several principal investigators affiliated with IQSS in pre-award and post-award services for federal and private foundation awards.

View the original profile at iq.harvard.edu
